name: SRI CHAITANYA TECHNO SCHOOL - Manapakkam

address.Address: Survey No:472, Thiruvalluvar Nagar Park, 1, Balaraman St, Sriram Gardens, Thiruvalluvar Nagar, Manapakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600125, India

address.streetAddress: Survey No:472, Thiruvalluvar Nagar Park, 1, Balaraman St, Sriram Gardens, Thiruvalluvar Nagar, Manapakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600125, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: Hello Everyone, My Son V. DHAKSHAN is studying in grade IK2 Carnation, Sri Chaitanya school of Manapakkam have a strong reputation. He quickly got attracted to her school because of the teacher. I thank the teachers who helped my son to be disciplined and friendliness..

Never get enrolled for high school in this branch. There is nothing good to put our children here. Not so qualified teachers, poorly ventilated classrooms, no canteen, eccentric school timings ( it’s 8am to 4.40 pm) and forgot about sports.

These people don’t teach our children any values and all they care about is scores.

I had enrolled my elder son here while my younger is in Omega. I will definitely not enrol my younger son here.

I would like to congratulate the School and the teachers along with the participants for putting up a great Expo ‘Aurora’ at Manapakkam campus.  The Science exhibition was astonishing. The models, presentations, experiments were amazing. The great efforts in putting this together were evident in the performances of the students who showcased immense confidence, innovation, knowledge and technical skills while exhibiting them.
A big applause to all the teachers and participants who practiced for many hours numerous times with complete sincerity and diligence. Days of Planning and implementation can be seen in everyone’s tremendous efforts. Most importantly, this exhibition covers not only informative things but also Planetarium effect solar system brief room, Scary house and play room is a good idea.
As they say, ‘Great leaders inspire others’, a special thanks to Principal Ma’am, the Management of Sri Chaitanya techno School and the teachers for providing this platform and giving opportunities to our children for their holistic development. I really appreciate being a part of it.

Chaitanya School is one of the best school. And the best thing is very friendly and kind nature staffs. Coordinate each and every thing with the teachers easily. My little one is initially not like to go to school within a week she was adapted and liked to go to school because of her class teacher. And my another kid is studying 3 std Mavericks . She likes a lot to study there and love her teachers. Special mentions to the Mavericks Team for their well planned curriculum and extra activities, both my kids love the school.

Our experience with Chaitanya Manapakkam has been exceptional. The teachers are truly invested in my children’s education and their growth as learners. Periodical updates are made to improve the GK and skills to the learners. My kid was very shy to talk in front of people, but the teachers boosted up his confidence and we are seeing remarkable change. Annual day celebration conducted was good as well as the Science fair was arranged in very good way. Kids are developing their though & skills due to this kind of platform.
Principal mam is very friendly and polite, also always reachable and willing to support the parents for the queries related to the academics. Administration staffs also open minded and think outside the box to make a successful educational experience for the students. They teach value lessons, behavior, communication and leadership skills. Thanks for your support & efforts.
I wish to the entire team good luck and keep it up.

Our experience at Chaitanya Manapakkam has been exceptional. The teachers are truly invested in my children’s education and their growth as learners. Adjustments are made as needed to meet the needs of the student like they started GK classes. My children to gain confidence in their learning abilities. Science fair was arranged in very good way. Kids are developing their though & skills due to this kind of platform

Principal & Administration is open minded and think outside the box to make a successful educational experience for the students.They teach value lessons, communication and leadership skills. Thanks for your support & efforts.
